layout.title: Show bookings
layout.message: Show booking details for the current user

field.name: note1
field.label: This menu option should only be visible to users that have logged in

field.name: page_intro
field.label: Page Introduction
field.description: Text to be shown before the details

field.name: note2
field.label: For information about this component please visit: https://docs.stokeandnewcastleramblers.org.uk and read the Webmasters Guide
